mcps.name: Filesystem MCP Server
mcps.description: Node.js MCP server for comprehensive filesystem operations - read/write files, manage directories, search files, and get file metadata with configurable access control

mcps.name: Excel MCP Server
mcps.description: Python MCP server for comprehensive Excel file manipulation without requiring Microsoft Excel - create workbooks, read/write data, format cells, create charts and pivot tables with support for stdio, SSE, and HTTP transports

mcps.name: MCP Timeserver
mcps.description: Python MCP server that provides current date/time information to LLMs via datetime:// URI scheme for timezone access and a tool interface for local time queries

mcps.name: TiDB MCP Server
mcps.description: Python MCP server for TiDB Serverless database operations with connection pooling, transaction support, automatic retry logic, and comprehensive SQL query/execute capabilities
